column1:
They do their homework in the evening.

__________ their homework in the evening?

It often rained last month.

__________ last month?

She invited somebody to the party.

__________ somebody to the party?

We shall have six lessons tomorrow.

__________ six lessons tomorrow?

There is something in the cup.

__________ something in the cup?

There was something in the basket.

__________ something in the basket?

He does his homework at 5 o'clock.

__________ his homework at 5 o'clock?

It often snowed last week.

__________ last week?
